4911
4918size_t netw_calculate_urlencoded_size(const char* str, size_t len) {
4919 __n_assert(str, return 0);
4920
4921 size_t encoded_size = 0;
4922
4923 for (size_t i = 0; i < len; i++) {
4924 unsigned char c = (unsigned char)str[i];
4925 if (isalnum(c) || c == '-' || c == '_' || c == '.' || c == '~') {
4926 encoded_size += 1; // Safe character, no encoding needed
4927 } else {
4928 encoded_size += 3; // Unsafe character, will be encoded as %XX
4929 }
4930 }
4931
4932 return encoded_size;
4933}
4934
4941char* netw_urlencode(const char* str, size_t len) {
4942 __n_assert(str, return NULL);
4943
4944 static const char* hex = "0123456789ABCDEF";
4945 size_t encoded_size = netw_calculate_urlencoded_size(str, len);
4946 char* encoded = (char*)malloc(encoded_size + 1); // Allocate memory for the encoded string (+1 for the null terminator)
4947
4948 if (!encoded) {
4949 return NULL; // Return NULL if memory allocation fails
4950 }
4951
4952 char* pbuf = encoded;
4953
4954 for (size_t i = 0; i < len; i++) {
4955 unsigned char c = (unsigned char)str[i];
4956 if (isalnum(c) || c == '-' || c == '_' || c == '.' || c == '~') {
4957 *pbuf++ = (char)c; // Copy safe characters directly
4958 } else {
4959 *pbuf++ = '%'; // Encode unsafe characters as %XX
4960 *pbuf++ = hex[c >> 4];
4961 *pbuf++ = hex[c & 0xF];
4962 }
4963 }
4964
4965 *pbuf = '\0'; // Null-terminate the encoded string
4966 return encoded;
4967}
4968
4974char* netw_extract_http_request_type(const char* request) {
4975 __n_assert(request, return NULL);
4976 // Find the first space in the request string
4977 const char* space = strchr(request, ' ');
4978
4979 if (space == NULL) {
4980 // No space found, invalid request format
4981 return NULL;
4982 }
4983
4984 // Calculate the length of the request type
4985 size_t method_length = (size_t)(space - request);
4986
4987 // Allocate memory for the method string (+1 for the null terminator)
4988 char* method = (char*)malloc(method_length + 1);
4989
4990 if (method == NULL) {
4991 // Memory allocation failed
4992 return NULL;
4993 }
4994
4995 // Copy the request method to the allocated memory
4996 strncpy(method, request, method_length);
4997 method[method_length] = '\0'; // Null-terminate the string
4998
4999 return method;
5000}
5001
5007NETWORK_HTTP_INFO netw_extract_http_info(char* request) {
5008 NETWORK_HTTP_INFO info = {.content_length = 0, .body = NULL, .type = NULL, .content_type = {0}};
5009
5010 __n_assert(request, return info);
5011
5012 // Hold the request-type allocation in a local until just before return.
5013 // The clang static analyzer's unix.Malloc checker mis-tracks ownership
5014 // when a malloc'd pointer is parked in a returned-by-value struct member
5015 // early in the function; keeping it local until the final assignment
5016 // makes the escape via the returned struct unambiguous to the analyzer.
5017 char* request_type = netw_extract_http_request_type(request);
5018
5019 // Find Content-Type header (Optional)
5020 const char* content_type_header = strstr(request, "Content-Type:");
5021 if (content_type_header) {
5022 const char* start = content_type_header + strlen("Content-Type: ");
5023 const char* end = strstr(start, "\r\n");
5024 if (end) {
5025 size_t length = (size_t)(end - start);
5026 if (length > 255) length = 255;
5027 strncpy(info.content_type, start, length);
5028 info.content_type[length] = '\0';
5029 }
5030 } else {
5031 // If no Content-Type header found, set default
5032 strncpy(info.content_type, "text/plain", sizeof(info.content_type) - 1);
5033 }
5034
5035 // Find Content-Length header (Optional)
5036 const char* content_length_header = strstr(request, "Content-Length:");
5037 if (content_length_header) {
5038 const char* start = content_length_header + strlen("Content-Length: ");
5039 errno = 0;
5040 unsigned long tmp_cl = strtoul(start, NULL, 10); /* parse once */
5041 int error = errno;
5042 // Handle out-of-range error (e.g., set a safe default or return an error)
5043 // Only when ULONG_MAX is larger than SIZE_MAX, to prevent a constant false comparison warning
5044#if ULONG_MAX > SIZE_MAX
5045 if (error == ERANGE || tmp_cl > SIZE_MAX) {
5046#else
5047 if (error == ERANGE) {
5048#endif
5049 n_log(LOG_ERR, "could not get content_length for request %p, returned %s", request, strerror(error));
5050 info.content_length = SIZE_MAX; /* clamp to the maximum supported value */
5051 } else {
5052 info.content_length = (size_t)tmp_cl;
5053 }
5054 }
5055
5056 // Find the start of the body (after \r\n\r\n)
5057 const char* body_start = strstr(request, "\r\n\r\n");
5058 if (body_start) {
5059 body_start += 4; // Skip the \r\n\r\n
5060
5061 // If there is a Content-Length, and it's greater than 0, copy the body
5062 if (info.content_length > 0 && info.content_length < SIZE_MAX) {
5063 info.body = malloc(info.content_length + 1); // Allocate memory for body
5064 if (info.body) {
5065 strncpy(info.body, body_start, info.content_length);
5066 info.body[info.content_length] = '\0'; // Null-terminate the body
5067 }
5068 }
5069 }
5070
5071 info.type = request_type;
5072 return info;
5073}
5074
5080int netw_info_destroy(NETWORK_HTTP_INFO http_request) {
5081 FreeNoLog(http_request.body);
5082 FreeNoLog(http_request.type);
5083 return TRUE;
5084}
5085
5093int netw_get_url_from_http_request(const char* request, char* url, size_t size) {
5094 __n_assert(request && strlen(request) > 0, return FALSE);
5095 __n_assert(url && size > 1, return FALSE);
5096
5097 /* Default output */
5098 strncpy(url, "/", size - 1);
5099 url[size - 1] = '\0';
5100
5101 /* Example request line: "GET /path/to/resource HTTP/1.1" */
5102 const char* first_space = strchr(request, ' ');
5103 if (!first_space) {
5104 /* Malformed request, return default '/' */
5105 return FALSE;
5106 }
5107
5108 const char* second_space = strchr(first_space + 1, ' ');
5109 if (!second_space) {
5110 /* Malformed request, return default '/' */
5111 return FALSE;
5112 }
5113
5114 size_t len = (size_t)(second_space - first_space - 1);
5115 if (len >= size) {
5116 len = size - 1;
5117 }
5118
5119 strncpy(url, first_space + 1, len);
5120 url[len] = '\0'; /* Null-terminate the URL */
5121
5122 return TRUE;
5123}
5124
5130char* netw_urldecode(const char* str) {
5131 __n_assert(str, return NULL);
5132 char* decoded = malloc(strlen(str) + 1);
5133 __n_assert(decoded, return NULL);
5134
5135 char* p = decoded;
5136 while (*str) {
5137 if (*str == '%') {
5138 if (isxdigit((unsigned char)str[1]) && isxdigit((unsigned char)str[2])) {
5139 unsigned int value;
5140 if (sscanf(str + 1, "%2x", &value) >= 1) {
5141 *p++ = (char)value;
5142 str += 3;
5143 } else {
5144 n_log(LOG_ERR, "sscanf could not parse char *str (%p) for a %%2x", str);
5145 Free(decoded);
5146 return NULL;
5147 }
5148 } else {
5149 *p++ = *str++;
5150 }
5151 } else if (*str == '+') {
5152 *p++ = ' ';
5153 str++;
5154 } else {
5155 *p++ = *str++;
5156 }
5157 }
5158 *p = '\0';
5159 return decoded;
5160}
5161
5167HASH_TABLE* netw_parse_post_data(const char* post_data) {
5168 __n_assert(post_data, return NULL);
5169
5170 // Create a copy of the post_data string because strtok modifies the string
5171 char* data = strdup(post_data);
5172 __n_assert(data, return NULL);
5173
5174 char* pair = data;
5175
5176 HASH_TABLE* post_data_table = new_ht(32);
5177
5178 while (pair != NULL) {
5179 // Find the next key-value pair separated by '&'
5180 char* ampersand_pos = strchr(pair, '&');
5181
5182 // If found, replace it with '\0' to isolate the current pair
5183 if (ampersand_pos != NULL) {
5184 *ampersand_pos = '\0';
5185 }
5186
5187 // Now split each pair by '=' to get the key and value
5188 char* equal_pos = strchr(pair, '=');
5189 if (equal_pos != NULL) {
5190 *equal_pos = '\0'; // Terminate the key string
5191 const char* key = pair;
5192 const char* value = equal_pos + 1;
5193
5194 // Decode the value since POST data is URL-encoded
5195 char* decoded_value = netw_urldecode(value);
5196 ht_put_string(post_data_table, key, decoded_value);
5197 // printf("Key: %s, Value: %s\n", key, decoded_value);
5198 free(decoded_value);
5199 }
5200 // Move to the next key-value pair (if any)
5201 pair = (ampersand_pos != NULL) ? (ampersand_pos + 1) : NULL;
5202 }
5203 // Free the duplicated string
5204 free(data);
5205 return post_data_table;
5206}
5207
5213const char* netw_guess_http_content_type(const char* url) {
5214 __n_assert(url, return NULL);
5215
5216 // Create a copy of the URL to work on (to avoid modifying the original string)
5217 char url_copy[1024];
5218 strncpy(url_copy, url, sizeof(url_copy) - 1);
5219 url_copy[sizeof(url_copy) - 1] = '\0';
5220
5221 // Find if there is a '?' (indicating GET parameters) and terminate the string there
5222 char* query_start = strchr(url_copy, '?');
5223 if (query_start) {
5224 *query_start = '\0'; // Terminate the string before the query parameters
5225 }
5226
5227 // Find the last occurrence of a dot in the URL (file extension)
5228 const char* ext = strrchr(url_copy, '.');
5229
5230 // If no extension is found, return "unknown"
5231 if (!ext) {
5232 return "unknown";
5233 }
5234
5235 // Compare the extension to known content types
5236 if (strcmp(ext, ".html") == 0 || strcmp(ext, ".htm") == 0) {
5237 return "text/html";
5238 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".txt") == 0) {
5239 return "text/plain";
5240 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".jpg") == 0 || strcmp(ext, ".jpeg") == 0) {
5241 return "image/jpeg";
5242 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".png") == 0) {
5243 return "image/png";
5244 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".gif") == 0) {
5245 return "image/gif";
5246 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".css") == 0) {
5247 return "text/css";
5248 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".js") == 0) {
5249 return "application/javascript";
5250 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".json") == 0) {
5251 return "application/json";
5252 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".xml") == 0) {
5253 return "application/xml";
5254 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".pdf") == 0) {
5255 return "application/pdf";
5256 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".zip") == 0) {
5257 return "application/zip";
5258 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".mp4") == 0) {
5259 return "video/mp4";
5260 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".mp3") == 0) {
5261 return "audio/mpeg";
5262 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".wav") == 0) {
5263 return "audio/wav";
5264 } else if (strcmp(ext, ".ogg") == 0) {
5265 return "audio/ogg";
5266 }
5267
5268 // Return unknown for other types
5269 return "unknown";
5270}
5271
5277const char* netw_get_http_status_message(int status_code) {
5278 switch (status_code) {
5279 case 200:
5280 return "OK";
5281 case 204:
5282 return "No Content";
5283 case 304:
5284 return "Not Modified";
5285 case 404:
5286 return "Not Found";
5287 case 500:
5288 return "Internal Server Error";
5289 // Add more status codes as needed
5290 default:
5291 return "Unknown";
5292 }
5293}
5294
5301int netw_get_http_date(char* buffer, size_t buffer_size) {
5302 __n_assert(buffer, return FALSE);
5303 const time_t now = time(NULL);
5304 struct tm gmt;
5305#ifdef _WIN32
5306 if (gmtime_s(&gmt, &now) != 0) {
5307 n_log(LOG_ERR, "gmtime_s failed");
5308 return FALSE;
5309 }
5310#else
5311 if (!gmtime_r(&now, &gmt)) {
5312 n_log(LOG_ERR, "gmtime_r returned NULL");
5313 return FALSE;
5314 }
5315#endif
5316 if (strftime(buffer, buffer_size, "%a, %d %b %Y %H:%M:%S GMT", &gmt) == 0) {
5317 n_log(LOG_ERR, "strftime failed: buffer too small");
5318 return FALSE;
5319 }
5320 return TRUE;
5321}
5322
5333int netw_build_http_response(N_STR** http_response, int status_code, const char* server_name, const char* content_type, char* additional_headers, N_STR* body) {
5334 __n_assert(server_name, return FALSE);
5335 __n_assert(content_type, return FALSE);
5336 __n_assert(additional_headers, return FALSE);
5337
5338 const char* status_message = netw_get_http_status_message(status_code);
5339 const char* connection_type = "close";
5340
5341 // Buffer for the date header
5342 char date_buffer[128] = "";
5343 netw_get_http_date(date_buffer, sizeof(date_buffer));
5344
5345 if ((*http_response)) {
5346 (*http_response)->written = 0;
5347 }
5348
5349 if (!body || body->written == 0) {
5350 // Handle the case where there is no body
5351 nstrprintf((*http_response),
5352 "HTTP/1.1 %d %s\r\n"
5353 "Date: %s\r\n"
5354 "Server: %s\r\n"
5355 "Content-Length: 0\r\n"
5356 "%s"
5357 "Connection: %s\r\n\r\n",
5358 status_code, status_message, date_buffer, server_name, additional_headers, connection_type);
5359 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "empty response");
5360 } else {
5361 // Build the response with body
5362 nstrprintf((*http_response),
5363 "HTTP/1.1 %d %s\r\n"
5364 "Date: %s\r\n"
5365 "Server: %s\r\n"
5366 "Content-Type: %s\r\n"
5367 "Content-Length: %zu\r\n"
5368 "%s"
5369 "Connection: %s\r\n\r\n",
5370 status_code, status_message, date_buffer, server_name, content_type, body->written, additional_headers, connection_type);
5371 nstrcat((*http_response), body);
5372 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "body response");
5373 }
5374 return TRUE;
5375}
5376
5377#ifdef HAVE_OPENSSL
5378
5384static ssize_t _ws_write(N_WS_CONN* conn, const void* buf, size_t len) {
5385 __n_assert(conn, return -1);
5386 __n_assert(conn->netw, return -1);
5387 if (conn->netw->crypto_algo == NETW_ENCRYPT_OPENSSL && conn->netw->ssl) {
5388 int ret = SSL_write(conn->netw->ssl, buf, (int)len);
5389 return (ret > 0) ? (ssize_t)ret : -1;
5390 }
5391 ssize_t ret = send(conn->netw->link.sock, buf, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(len), NETFLAGS);
5392 return ret;
5393}
5394
5400static ssize_t _ws_read(N_WS_CONN* conn, void* buf, size_t len) {
5401 __n_assert(conn, return -1);
5402 __n_assert(conn->netw, return -1);
5403 size_t total = 0;
5404 char* p = (char*)buf;
5405 while (total < len) {
5406 ssize_t ret = 0;
5407 if (conn->netw->crypto_algo == NETW_ENCRYPT_OPENSSL && conn->netw->ssl) {
5408 ret = SSL_read(conn->netw->ssl, p + total, (int)(len - total));
5409 } else {
5410 ret = recv(conn->netw->link.sock, p + total, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(len - total), 0);
5411 }
5412 if (ret <= 0) {
5413 return -1;
5414 }
5415 total += (size_t)ret;
5416 }
5417 return (ssize_t)total;
5418}
5419
5431N_WS_CONN* n_ws_connect(const char* host, const char* port, const char* path, int use_ssl) {
5432 __n_assert(host, return NULL);
5433 __n_assert(port, return NULL);
5434 __n_assert(path, return NULL);
5435
5436 N_WS_CONN* conn = NULL;
5437 Malloc(conn, N_WS_CONN, 1);
5438 __n_assert(conn, return NULL);
5439
5440 conn->netw = NULL;
5441 conn->connected = 0;
5442 conn->host = strdup(host);
5443 conn->path = strdup(path);
5444 if (!conn->host || !conn->path) {
5445 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_connect: strdup failed");
5446 goto ws_connect_fail;
5447 }
5448
5449 /* establish TCP + optional SSL */
5450 if (use_ssl) {
5451 if (netw_ssl_connect_client(&conn->netw, (char*)host, (char*)port, NETWORK_IPALL) == FALSE) {
5452 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_connect: TCP+SSL context setup failed for %s:%s", host, port);
5453 goto ws_connect_fail;
5454 }
5455 if (netw_ssl_do_handshake(conn->netw, host) == FALSE) {
5456 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_ws_connect: SSL handshake failed for %s:%s", host, port);
5457 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_connect: SSL handshake failed for %s:%s", host, port);
5458 goto ws_connect_fail;
5459 }
5460 } else {
5461 if (netw_connect(&conn->netw, (char*)host, (char*)port, NETWORK_IPALL) == FALSE) {
5462 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_connect: TCP connect failed for %s:%s", host, port);
5463 goto ws_connect_fail;
5464 }
5465 }
5466
5467 /* generate Sec-WebSocket-Key: base64 of 16 random bytes */
5468 unsigned char rand_bytes[16];
5469 if (RAND_bytes(rand_bytes, 16) != 1) {
5470 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_ws_connect: RAND_bytes failed");
5471 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_connect: RAND_bytes failed");
5472 goto ws_connect_fail;
5473 }
5474
5475 N_STR* rand_nstr = new_nstr(16);
5476 __n_assert(rand_nstr, goto ws_connect_fail);
5477 memcpy(rand_nstr->data, rand_bytes, 16);
5478 rand_nstr->written = 16;
5479
5480 N_STR* ws_key_nstr = n_base64_encode(rand_nstr);
5481 free_nstr(&rand_nstr);
5482 __n_assert(ws_key_nstr, goto ws_connect_fail);
5483 /* strip any trailing whitespace from base64 output */
5484 while (ws_key_nstr->written > 0 &&
5485 (ws_key_nstr->data[ws_key_nstr->written - 1] == '\n' ||
5486 ws_key_nstr->data[ws_key_nstr->written - 1] == '\r' ||
5487 ws_key_nstr->data[ws_key_nstr->written - 1] == ' ')) {
5488 ws_key_nstr->data[--ws_key_nstr->written] = '\0';
5489 }
5490
5491 /* build HTTP upgrade request */
5492 char upgrade_req[2048];
5493 int req_len = snprintf(upgrade_req, sizeof(upgrade_req),
5494 "GET %s HTTP/1.1\r\n"
5495 "Host: %s\r\n"
5496 "Upgrade: websocket\r\n"
5497 "Connection: Upgrade\r\n"
5498 "Sec-WebSocket-Key: %s\r\n"
5499 "Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13\r\n"
5500 "\r\n",
5501 path, host, ws_key_nstr->data);
5502
5503 if (req_len < 0 || (size_t)req_len >= sizeof(upgrade_req)) {
5504 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_ws_connect: upgrade request too large");
5505 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_connect: upgrade request too large");
5506 free_nstr(&ws_key_nstr);
5507 goto ws_connect_fail;
5508 }
5509
5510 /* send upgrade request */
5511 if (_ws_write(conn, upgrade_req, (size_t)req_len) < 0) {
5512 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_ws_connect: failed to send upgrade request");
5513 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_connect: failed to send upgrade request");
5514 free_nstr(&ws_key_nstr);
5515 goto ws_connect_fail;
5516 }
5517
5518 /* read response (up to 4096 bytes, look for \r\n\r\n) */
5519 char resp_buf[4096];
5520 memset(resp_buf, 0, sizeof(resp_buf));
5521 size_t resp_len = 0;
5522 while (resp_len < sizeof(resp_buf) - 1) {
5523 ssize_t r = 0;
5524 if (conn->netw->crypto_algo == NETW_ENCRYPT_OPENSSL && conn->netw->ssl) {
5525 r = SSL_read(conn->netw->ssl, resp_buf + resp_len, 1);
5526 } else {
5527 r = recv(conn->netw->link.sock, resp_buf + resp_len, 1, 0);
5528 }
5529 if (r <= 0) {
5530 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_ws_connect: failed reading handshake response");
5531 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_connect: failed reading handshake response");
5532 free_nstr(&ws_key_nstr);
5533 goto ws_connect_fail;
5534 }
5535 resp_len += (size_t)r;
5536 if (resp_len >= 4 &&
5537 resp_buf[resp_len - 4] == '\r' && resp_buf[resp_len - 3] == '\n' &&
5538 resp_buf[resp_len - 2] == '\r' && resp_buf[resp_len - 1] == '\n') {
5539 break;
5540 }
5541 }
5542 resp_buf[resp_len] = '\0';
5543
5544 /* verify 101 Switching Protocols */
5545 if (strstr(resp_buf, "101") == NULL) {
5546 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_ws_connect: server did not return 101: %.128s", resp_buf);
5547 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_connect: server did not return 101: %.128s", resp_buf);
5548 free_nstr(&ws_key_nstr);
5549 goto ws_connect_fail;
5550 }
5551
5552 /* verify Sec-WebSocket-Accept */
5553 static const char ws_magic[] = "258EAFA5-E914-47DA-95CA-5AB5FE44F513";
5554 char concat_key[256];
5555 snprintf(concat_key, sizeof(concat_key), "%s%s", ws_key_nstr->data, ws_magic);
5556 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "n_ws_connect: key sent: [%s] len:%zu", ws_key_nstr->data, ws_key_nstr->written);
5557 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "n_ws_connect: concat_key: [%s]", concat_key);
5558 free_nstr(&ws_key_nstr);
5559
5560 unsigned char sha1_hash[SHA_DIGEST_LENGTH];
5561 SHA1((const unsigned char*)concat_key, strlen(concat_key), sha1_hash);
5562
5563 N_STR* sha1_nstr = new_nstr(SHA_DIGEST_LENGTH);
5564 __n_assert(sha1_nstr, goto ws_connect_fail);
5565 memcpy(sha1_nstr->data, sha1_hash, SHA_DIGEST_LENGTH);
5566 sha1_nstr->written = SHA_DIGEST_LENGTH;
5567
5568 N_STR* expected_accept = n_base64_encode(sha1_nstr);
5569 free_nstr(&sha1_nstr);
5570 __n_assert(expected_accept, goto ws_connect_fail);
5571 /* strip trailing whitespace from base64 output */
5572 while (expected_accept->written > 0 &&
5573 (expected_accept->data[expected_accept->written - 1] == '\n' ||
5574 expected_accept->data[expected_accept->written - 1] == '\r' ||
5575 expected_accept->data[expected_accept->written - 1] == ' ')) {
5576 expected_accept->data[--expected_accept->written] = '\0';
5577 }
5578
5579 /* find Sec-WebSocket-Accept in response (case-insensitive search) */
5580 const char* accept_hdr = NULL;
5581 char* search_pos = resp_buf;
5582 while (*search_pos) {
5583 if (strncasecmp(search_pos, "Sec-WebSocket-Accept:", 21) == 0) {
5584 accept_hdr = search_pos + 21;
5585 break;
5586 }
5587 search_pos++;
5588 }
5589 if (!accept_hdr) {
5590 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_ws_connect: no Sec-WebSocket-Accept header in response");
5591 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_connect: no Sec-WebSocket-Accept header in response");
5592 free_nstr(&expected_accept);
5593 goto ws_connect_fail;
5594 }
5595 /* skip whitespace */
5596 while (*accept_hdr == ' ') accept_hdr++;
5597 /* compare up to expected length; trim trailing \r\n from accept_hdr */
5598 char accept_val[128];
5599 {
5600 int ai = 0;
5601 while (accept_hdr[ai] && accept_hdr[ai] != '\r' && accept_hdr[ai] != '\n' && ai < (int)sizeof(accept_val) - 1) {
5602 accept_val[ai] = accept_hdr[ai];
5603 ai++;
5604 }
5605 accept_val[ai] = '\0';
5606 }
5607 if (strcmp(accept_val, expected_accept->data) != 0) {
5608 /* Many proxies (Fly.io, Cloudflare, etc.) re-key the handshake,
5609 * so the accept may not match. Log as debug, not error. */
5610 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "n_ws_connect: Sec-WebSocket-Accept mismatch (proxy?): got [%s] expected [%s]",
5611 accept_val, expected_accept->data);
5612 }
5613 free_nstr(&expected_accept);
5614
5615 conn->connected = 1;
5616 n_log(LOG_INFO, "n_ws_connect: WebSocket handshake completed with %s:%s%s", host, port, path);
5617 return conn;
5618
5619ws_connect_fail:
5620 n_ws_conn_free(&conn);
5621 return NULL;
5622}
5623
5635int n_ws_send(N_WS_CONN* conn, const char* payload, size_t len, int opcode) {
5636 __n_assert(conn, return -1);
5637 __n_assert(conn->netw, return -1);
5638
5639 /* max frame overhead: 2 (header) + 8 (ext len) + 4 (mask) = 14 */
5640 size_t frame_max = 14 + len;
5641 unsigned char* frame = NULL;
5642 Malloc(frame, unsigned char, frame_max);
5643 __n_assert(frame, return -1);
5644
5645 size_t pos = 0;
5646
5647 /* byte 0: FIN + opcode */
5648 frame[pos++] = (unsigned char)(0x80 | (opcode & 0x0F));
5649
5650 /* byte 1+: mask bit set + payload length */
5651 if (len <= 125) {
5652 frame[pos++] = (unsigned char)(0x80 | len);
5653 } else if (len <= 65535) {
5654 frame[pos++] = (unsigned char)(0x80 | 126);
5655 frame[pos++] = (unsigned char)((len >> 8) & 0xFF);
5656 frame[pos++] = (unsigned char)(len & 0xFF);
5657 } else {
5658 frame[pos++] = (unsigned char)(0x80 | 127);
5659 for (int i = 7; i >= 0; i--) {
5660 frame[pos++] = (unsigned char)((len >> (8 * i)) & 0xFF);
5661 }
5662 }
5663
5664 /* masking key: 4 random bytes */
5665 unsigned char mask_key[4];
5666 if (RAND_bytes(mask_key, 4) != 1) {
5667 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_ws_send: RAND_bytes failed for mask key");
5668 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_send: RAND_bytes failed for mask key");
5669 FreeNoLog(frame);
5670 return -1;
5671 }
5672 memcpy(frame + pos, mask_key, 4);
5673 pos += 4;
5674
5675 /* masked payload */
5676 if (payload && len > 0) {
5677 for (size_t i = 0; i < len; i++) {
5678 frame[pos + i] = (unsigned char)((unsigned char)payload[i] ^ mask_key[i % 4]);
5679 }
5680 pos += len;
5681 }
5682
5683 ssize_t written = _ws_write(conn, frame, pos);
5684 FreeNoLog(frame);
5685 if (written < 0 || (size_t)written != pos) {
5686 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_ws_send: write failed (wrote %zd of %zu)", written, pos);
5687 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_ws_send: write failed (wrote %zd of %zu)", written, pos);
5688 return -1;
5689 }
5690 return 0;
5691}
5692
5702int n_ws_recv(N_WS_CONN* conn, N_WS_MESSAGE* msg_out) {
5703 __n_assert(conn, return -1);
5704 __n_assert(conn->netw, return -1);
5705 __n_assert(msg_out, return -1);
5706
5707 memset(msg_out, 0, sizeof(*msg_out));
5708
5709 /* read 2-byte header */
5710 unsigned char hdr[2];
5711 if (_ws_read(conn, hdr, 2) < 0) {
5712 return -1;
5713 }
5714
5715 /* int fin = (hdr[0] >> 7) & 1; */
5716 int opcode = hdr[0] & 0x0F;
5717 int mask_bit = (hdr[1] >> 7) & 1;
5718 uint64_t payload_len = hdr[1] & 0x7F;
5719
5720 /* extended payload length */
5721 if (payload_len == 126) {
5722 unsigned char ext[2];
5723 if (_ws_read(conn, ext, 2) < 0) return -1;
5724 payload_len = ((uint64_t)ext[0] << 8) | (uint64_t)ext[1];
5725 } else if (payload_len == 127) {
5726 unsigned char ext[8];
5727 if (_ws_read(conn, ext, 8) < 0) return -1;
5728 payload_len = 0;
5729 for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
5730 payload_len = (payload_len << 8) | (uint64_t)ext[i];
5731 }
5732 }
5733
5734 /* read masking key if present */
5735 unsigned char mask_key[4] = {0};
5736 if (mask_bit) {
5737 if (_ws_read(conn, mask_key, 4) < 0) return -1;
5738 }
5739
5740 /* read payload */
5741 N_STR* payload = new_nstr((size_t)payload_len + 1);
5742 __n_assert(payload, return -1);
5743
5744 if (payload_len > 0) {
5745 if (_ws_read(conn, payload->data, (size_t)payload_len) < 0) {
5746 free_nstr(&payload);
5747 return -1;
5748 }
5749 /* unmask if needed */
5750 if (mask_bit) {
5751 for (uint64_t i = 0; i < payload_len; i++) {
5752 payload->data[i] = (char)((unsigned char)payload->data[i] ^ mask_key[i % 4]);
5753 }
5754 }
5755 }
5756 payload->written = (size_t)payload_len;
5757 payload->data[payload_len] = '\0';
5758
5759 msg_out->opcode = opcode;
5760 msg_out->payload = payload;
5761 msg_out->masked = mask_bit;
5762
5763 return 0;
5764}
5765
5774void n_ws_close(N_WS_CONN* conn) {
5775 __n_assert(conn, return);
5776
5777 if (conn->connected && conn->netw) {
5778 /* send close frame with empty payload */
5779 n_ws_send(conn, NULL, 0, N_WS_OP_CLOSE);
5780
5781 /* try to read close response with a short timeout */
5782 /* set non-blocking or just try one read */
5783 N_WS_MESSAGE msg;
5784 memset(&msg, 0, sizeof(msg));
5785 /* best effort: read one frame, ignore errors */
5786 if (n_ws_recv(conn, &msg) == 0) {
5787 free_nstr(&msg.payload);
5788 }
5789 conn->connected = 0;
5790 }
5791
5792 if (conn->netw) {
5793 netw_close(&conn->netw);
5794 }
5795}
5796
5804void n_ws_conn_free(N_WS_CONN** conn) {
5805 __n_assert(conn, return);
5806 __n_assert(*conn, return);
5807
5808 N_WS_CONN* c = *conn;
5809
5810 if (c->connected) {
5811 n_ws_close(c);
5812 }
5813
5814 if (c->netw) {
5815 netw_close(&c->netw);
5816 }
5817
5818 FreeNoLog(c->host);
5819 FreeNoLog(c->path);
5820 FreeNoLog(c);
5821 *conn = NULL;
5822}
5823
5828void n_sse_event_clean(N_SSE_EVENT* event) {
5829 if (!event) return;
5830 if (event->event) free_nstr(&event->event);
5831 if (event->data) free_nstr(&event->data);
5832 if (event->id) free_nstr(&event->id);
5833 event->retry = 0;
5834}
5835
5840void n_sse_stop(N_SSE_CONN* conn) {
5841 __n_assert(conn, return);
5842 __atomic_store_n(&conn->stop_flag, 1, __ATOMIC_RELEASE);
5843}
5844
5849void n_sse_conn_free(N_SSE_CONN** conn) {
5850 __n_assert(conn, return);
5851 __n_assert(*conn, return);
5852
5853 N_SSE_CONN* c = *conn;
5854 if (c->netw) {
5855 netw_close(&c->netw);
5856 }
5857 FreeNoLog(c);
5858 *conn = NULL;
5859}
5860
5867static ssize_t _sse_read_byte(NETWORK* netw, char* ch, volatile int* stop_flag) {
5868 __n_assert(netw, return -1);
5869
5870 /* poll with 500ms timeout so we can check stop_flag periodically */
5871 for (;;) {
5872 if (stop_flag && __atomic_load_n(stop_flag, __ATOMIC_ACQUIRE)) {
5873 return -1;
5874 }
5875 struct timeval tv;
5876 tv.tv_sec = 0;
5877 tv.tv_usec = 500000; /* 500ms */
5878 fd_set fds;
5879 FD_ZERO(&fds);
5880 FD_SET(netw->link.sock, &fds);
5881
5882 /* For SSL: check if there's already buffered data */
5883 int ready = 0;
5884 if (netw->crypto_algo == NETW_ENCRYPT_OPENSSL && netw->ssl) {
5885 if (SSL_pending(netw->ssl) > 0) {
5886 ready = 1;
5887 }
5888 }
5889 if (!ready) {
5890 int sel = select((int)netw->link.sock + 1, &fds, NULL, NULL, &tv);
5891 if (sel < 0) return -1; /* error */
5892 if (sel == 0) continue; /* timeout, loop back to check stop_flag */
5893 }
5894
5895 ssize_t ret = 0;
5896 if (netw->crypto_algo == NETW_ENCRYPT_OPENSSL && netw->ssl) {
5897 ret = SSL_read(netw->ssl, ch, 1);
5898 } else {
5899 ret = recv(netw->link.sock, ch, 1, 0);
5900 }
5901 return (ret == 1) ? 1 : -1;
5902 }
5903}
5904
5910static ssize_t _sse_write(NETWORK* netw, const void* buf, size_t len) {
5911 __n_assert(netw, return -1);
5912 if (netw->crypto_algo == NETW_ENCRYPT_OPENSSL && netw->ssl) {
5913 int ret = SSL_write(netw->ssl, buf, (int)len);
5914 return (ret > 0) ? (ssize_t)ret : -1;
5915 }
5916 ssize_t ret = send(netw->link.sock, buf, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(len), NETFLAGS);
5917 return ret;
5918}
5919
5934N_SSE_CONN* n_sse_connect(const char* host, const char* port, const char* path, int use_ssl, const char* user_agent, void (*on_event)(N_SSE_EVENT*, N_SSE_CONN*, void*), void* user_data) {
5935 __n_assert(host, return NULL);
5936 __n_assert(port, return NULL);
5937 __n_assert(path, return NULL);
5938 __n_assert(on_event, return NULL);
5939
5940 N_SSE_CONN* conn = NULL;
5941 Malloc(conn, N_SSE_CONN, 1);
5942 __n_assert(conn, return NULL);
5943
5944 conn->netw = NULL;
5945 conn->stop_flag = 0;
5946 conn->on_event = on_event;
5947 conn->user_data = user_data;
5948
5949 /* establish TCP + optional SSL */
5950 if (use_ssl) {
5951 if (netw_ssl_connect_client(&conn->netw, (char*)host, (char*)port, NETWORK_IPALL) == FALSE) {
5952 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_sse_connect: TCP+SSL context setup failed for %s:%s", host, port);
5953 goto sse_connect_fail;
5954 }
5955 if (netw_ssl_do_handshake(conn->netw, host) == FALSE) {
5956 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_sse_connect: SSL handshake failed for %s:%s", host, port);
5957 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_sse_connect: SSL handshake failed for %s:%s", host, port);
5958 goto sse_connect_fail;
5959 }
5960 } else {
5961 if (netw_connect(&conn->netw, (char*)host, (char*)port, NETWORK_IPALL) == FALSE) {
5962 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_sse_connect: TCP connect failed for %s:%s", host, port);
5963 goto sse_connect_fail;
5964 }
5965 }
5966
5967 /* send HTTP GET with SSE headers */
5968 char request[4096];
5969 int req_len;
5970 if (user_agent && user_agent[0]) {
5971 req_len = snprintf(request, sizeof(request),
5972 "GET %s HTTP/1.1\r\n"
5973 "Host: %s\r\n"
5974 "Accept: text/event-stream\r\n"
5975 "Cache-Control: no-cache\r\n"
5976 "Connection: keep-alive\r\n"
5977 "User-Agent: %s\r\n"
5978 "\r\n",
5979 path, host, user_agent);
5980 } else {
5981 req_len = snprintf(request, sizeof(request),
5982 "GET %s HTTP/1.1\r\n"
5983 "Host: %s\r\n"
5984 "Accept: text/event-stream\r\n"
5985 "Cache-Control: no-cache\r\n"
5986 "Connection: keep-alive\r\n"
5987 "\r\n",
5988 path, host);
5989 }
5990
5991 if (req_len < 0 || (size_t)req_len >= sizeof(request)) {
5992 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_sse_connect: request too large");
5993 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_sse_connect: request too large");
5994 goto sse_connect_fail;
5995 }
5996
5997 if (_sse_write(conn->netw, request, (size_t)req_len) < 0) {
5998 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_sse_connect: failed to send HTTP request");
5999 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_sse_connect: failed to send HTTP request");
6000 goto sse_connect_fail;
6001 }
6002
6003 /* read HTTP response headers (byte by byte until \r\n\r\n) */
6004 char resp_buf[8192];
6005 size_t resp_len = 0;
6006 while (resp_len < sizeof(resp_buf) - 1) {
6007 char ch = 0;
6008 if (_sse_read_byte(conn->netw, &ch, NULL) < 0) {
6009 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_sse_connect: failed reading HTTP response");
6010 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_sse_connect: failed reading HTTP response");
6011 goto sse_connect_fail;
6012 }
6013 resp_buf[resp_len++] = ch;
6014 if (resp_len >= 4 &&
6015 resp_buf[resp_len - 4] == '\r' && resp_buf[resp_len - 3] == '\n' &&
6016 resp_buf[resp_len - 2] == '\r' && resp_buf[resp_len - 1] == '\n') {
6017 break;
6018 }
6019 }
6020 resp_buf[resp_len] = '\0';
6021
6022 /* verify HTTP 200 status */
6023 if (strstr(resp_buf, "200") == NULL) {
6024 _netw_capture_error(conn->netw, "n_sse_connect: server did not return 200: %.128s", resp_buf);
6025 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_sse_connect: server did not return 200: %.128s", resp_buf);
6026 goto sse_connect_fail;
6027 }
6028
6029 n_log(LOG_INFO, "n_sse_connect: SSE connected to %s:%s%s", host, port, path);
6030
6031 /* enter SSE read loop */
6032 {
6033 N_SSE_EVENT current;
6034 memset(&current, 0, sizeof(current));
6035
6036 /* line buffer for SSE parsing */
6037 char line[8192];
6038 size_t line_len = 0;
6039
6040 while (!__atomic_load_n(&conn->stop_flag, __ATOMIC_ACQUIRE)) {
6041 char ch = 0;
6042 if (_sse_read_byte(conn->netw, &ch, &conn->stop_flag) < 0) {
6043 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "n_sse_connect: connection closed or read error");
6044 break;
6045 }
6046
6047 if (ch == '\n') {
6048 /* terminate line (strip trailing \r) */
6049 if (line_len > 0 && line[line_len - 1] == '\r') {
6050 line_len--;
6051 }
6052 line[line_len] = '\0';
6053
6054 if (line_len == 0) {
6055 /* empty line = dispatch event if we have data */
6056 if (current.data) {
6057 conn->on_event(&current, conn, conn->user_data);
6058 n_sse_event_clean(&current);
6059 memset(&current, 0, sizeof(current));
6060 }
6061 } else if (line[0] == ':') {
6062 /* comment line, ignore */
6063 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "n_sse_connect: comment: %s", line + 1);
6064 } else {
6065 /* parse field:value */
6066 char* colon = strchr(line, ':');
6067 const char* field = line;
6068 const char* value = "";
6069 if (colon) {
6070 *colon = '\0';
6071 value = colon + 1;
6072 /* skip single leading space after colon */
6073 if (*value == ' ') value++;
6074 }
6075
6076 if (strcmp(field, "data") == 0) {
6077 if (current.data) {
6078 /* append newline + value to existing data */
6079 nstrprintf_cat(current.data, "\n%s", value);
6080 } else {
6081 current.data = char_to_nstr((char*)value);
6082 }
6083 } else if (strcmp(field, "event") == 0) {
6084 if (current.event) free_nstr(&current.event);
6085 current.event = char_to_nstr((char*)value);
6086 } else if (strcmp(field, "id") == 0) {
6087 if (current.id) free_nstr(&current.id);
6088 current.id = char_to_nstr((char*)value);
6089 } else if (strcmp(field, "retry") == 0) {
6090 current.retry = atoi(value);
6091 }
6092 }
6093
6094 line_len = 0;
6095 } else {
6096 if (line_len < sizeof(line) - 1) {
6097 line[line_len++] = ch;
6098 }
6099 }
6100 }
6101
6102 /* clean up any partial event */
6103 n_sse_event_clean(&current);
6104 }
6105
6106 return conn;
6107
6108sse_connect_fail:
6109 n_sse_conn_free(&conn);
6110 return NULL;
6111}
6112
6113#endif /* HAVE_OPENSSL */
6114
6120static void _n_mock_parse_request(const char* buf, N_HTTP_REQUEST* req) {
6121 if (!buf || !req) return;
6122
6123 /* parse request line: METHOD PATH?QUERY HTTP/1.x */
6124 const char* line_end = strstr(buf, "\r\n");
6125 if (!line_end) line_end = strchr(buf, '\n');
6126 if (!line_end) return;
6127
6128 size_t line_len = (size_t)(line_end - buf);
6129 char line[4096];
6130 if (line_len >= sizeof(line)) line_len = sizeof(line) - 1;
6131 memcpy(line, buf, line_len);
6132 line[line_len] = '\0';
6133
6134 /* method */
6135 char* sp1 = strchr(line, ' ');
6136 if (!sp1) return;
6137 size_t mlen = (size_t)(sp1 - line);
6138 if (mlen >= sizeof(req->method)) mlen = sizeof(req->method) - 1;
6139 memcpy(req->method, line, mlen);
6140 req->method[mlen] = '\0';
6141
6142 /* path and query */
6143 sp1++;
6144 char* sp2 = strchr(sp1, ' ');
6145 if (sp2) *sp2 = '\0';
6146 char* qmark = strchr(sp1, '?');
6147 if (qmark) {
6148 *qmark = '\0';
6149 strncpy(req->query, qmark + 1, sizeof(req->query) - 1);
6150 req->query[sizeof(req->query) - 1] = '\0';
6151 }
6152 strncpy(req->path, sp1, sizeof(req->path) - 1);
6153 req->path[sizeof(req->path) - 1] = '\0';
6154
6155 /* headers: skip past request line */
6156 const char* hdr_start = line_end;
6157 if (*hdr_start == '\r') hdr_start++;
6158 if (*hdr_start == '\n') hdr_start++;
6159
6160 req->headers = new_generic_list(0);
6161
6162 const char* body_start = NULL;
6163 while (hdr_start && *hdr_start) {
6164 const char* next = strstr(hdr_start, "\r\n");
6165 if (!next) next = strchr(hdr_start, '\n');
6166 if (!next) break;
6167
6168 size_t hlen = (size_t)(next - hdr_start);
6169 if (hlen == 0) {
6170 /* blank line = end of headers */
6171 body_start = next;
6172 if (*body_start == '\r') body_start++;
6173 if (*body_start == '\n') body_start++;
6174 break;
6175 }
6176
6177 char* header_line = strndup(hdr_start, hlen);
6178 if (header_line) {
6179 list_push(req->headers, header_line, free);
6180 }
6181
6182 hdr_start = next;
6183 if (*hdr_start == '\r') hdr_start++;
6184 if (*hdr_start == '\n') hdr_start++;
6185 }
6186
6187 /* body */
6188 if (body_start && *body_start) {
6189 req->body = char_to_nstr(body_start);
6190 }
6191}
6192
6197static void _n_mock_request_clean(N_HTTP_REQUEST* req) {
6198 if (!req) return;
6199 if (req->headers) list_destroy(&req->headers);
6200 if (req->body) free_nstr(&req->body);
6201}
6202
6210N_MOCK_SERVER* n_mock_server_start(int port,
6211 void (*on_request)(N_HTTP_REQUEST*, N_HTTP_RESPONSE*, void*),
6212 void* user_data) {
6213 __n_assert(on_request, return NULL);
6214
6215 N_MOCK_SERVER* server = NULL;
6216 Malloc(server, N_MOCK_SERVER, 1);
6217 __n_assert(server, return NULL);
6218 memset(server, 0, sizeof(*server));
6219
6220 server->on_request = on_request;
6221 server->user_data = user_data;
6222 server->port = port;
6223 server->stop_flag = 0;
6224
6225 char port_str[16];
6226 snprintf(port_str, sizeof(port_str), "%d", port);
6227
6228 NETWORK* listener = NULL;
6229 if (netw_make_listening(&listener, NULL, port_str, 5, NETWORK_IPALL) != TRUE) {
6230 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_mock_server_start: failed to listen on port %d", port);
6231 FreeNoLog(server);
6232 return NULL;
6233 }
6234 server->listener = listener;
6235
6236 n_log(LOG_INFO, "mock server listening on port %d", port);
6237 return server;
6238}
6239
6244void n_mock_server_run(N_MOCK_SERVER* server) {
6245 __n_assert(server, return);
6246 __n_assert(server->listener, return);
6247
6248 while (!__atomic_load_n(&server->stop_flag, __ATOMIC_ACQUIRE)) {
6249 /* Use select with timeout to avoid blocking forever */
6250 fd_set readfds;
6251 FD_ZERO(&readfds);
6252 FD_SET(server->listener->link.sock, &readfds);
6253 struct timeval tv;
6254 tv.tv_sec = 0;
6255 tv.tv_usec = 200000; /* 200ms */
6256 int sel = select((int)(server->listener->link.sock + 1), &readfds, NULL, NULL, &tv);
6257 if (sel <= 0) continue;
6258
6259 /* Accept connection using netw_accept_from_ex with 1000ms timeout */
6260 int ret = 0;
6261 NETWORK* client = netw_accept_from_ex(server->listener, 0, 0, 1000, &ret);
6262 if (!client) continue;
6263
6264 /* Read HTTP request */
6265 char buf[8192];
6266 ssize_t n = recv(client->link.sock, buf, sizeof(buf) - 1, 0);
6267 if (n <= 0) {
6268 netw_close(&client);
6269 continue;
6270 }
6271 buf[n] = '\0';
6272
6273 /* Parse request */
6274 N_HTTP_REQUEST req;
6275 memset(&req, 0, sizeof(req));
6276 _n_mock_parse_request(buf, &req);
6277
6278 /* Prepare default response */
6279 N_HTTP_RESPONSE resp;
6280 memset(&resp, 0, sizeof(resp));
6281 resp.status_code = 404;
6282 strncpy(resp.content_type, "text/plain", sizeof(resp.content_type) - 1);
6283
6284 /* Call handler */
6285 server->on_request(&req, &resp, server->user_data);
6286
6287 /* Build HTTP response */
6288 const char* status_msg = netw_get_http_status_message(resp.status_code);
6289 if (!status_msg) status_msg = "Unknown";
6290
6291 size_t body_len = 0;
6292 const char* body_data = "";
6293 if (resp.body && resp.body->data) {
6294 body_data = resp.body->data;
6295 body_len = resp.body->written;
6296 }
6297
6298 char header_buf[1024];
6299 int hlen = snprintf(header_buf, sizeof(header_buf),
6300 "HTTP/1.1 %d %s\r\n"
6301 "Content-Type: %s\r\n"
6302 "Content-Length: %zu\r\n"
6303 "Connection: close\r\n"
6304 "\r\n",
6305 resp.status_code, status_msg,
6306 resp.content_type,
6307 body_len);
6308
6309 if (hlen > 0) {
6310 send(client->link.sock, header_buf, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(hlen), NETFLAGS);
6311 }
6312 if (body_len > 0) {
6313 send(client->link.sock, body_data, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(body_len), NETFLAGS);
6314 }
6315
6316 /* Cleanup */
6317 if (resp.body) free_nstr(&resp.body);
6318 _n_mock_request_clean(&req);
6319 netw_close(&client);
6320 }
6321
6322 n_log(LOG_INFO, "mock server stopped");
6323}
6324
6329void n_mock_server_stop(N_MOCK_SERVER* server) {
6330 __n_assert(server, return);
6331 __atomic_store_n(&server->stop_flag, 1, __ATOMIC_RELEASE);
6332}
6333
6338void n_mock_server_free(N_MOCK_SERVER** server) {
6339 __n_assert(server && *server, return);
6340 if ((*server)->listener) {
6341 netw_close(&(*server)->listener);
6342 }
6343 FreeNoLog(*server);
6344 *server = NULL;
6345}
6346
6347static void _n_parse_query_params(N_URL* u, const char* qs) {
6348 if (!u || !qs || !qs[0]) return;
6349 char* buf = strdup(qs);
6350 if (!buf) return;
6351 char* saveptr = NULL;
6352 const char* tok = strtok_r(buf, "&", &saveptr);
6353 while (tok && u->nb_params < N_URL_MAX_PARAMS) {
6354 char* eq = strchr(tok, '=');
6355 if (eq) {
6356 *eq = '\0';
6357 u->params[u->nb_params].key = strdup(tok);
6358 u->params[u->nb_params].value = strdup(eq + 1);
6359 } else {
6360 u->params[u->nb_params].key = strdup(tok);
6361 u->params[u->nb_params].value = strdup("");
6362 }
6363 u->nb_params++;
6364 tok = strtok_r(NULL, "&", &saveptr);
6365 }
6366 free(buf);
6367}
6368
6369N_URL* n_url_parse(const char* url) {
6370 if (!url) return NULL;
6371 N_URL* u = NULL;
6372 Malloc(u, N_URL, 1);
6373 if (!u) return NULL;
6374 memset(u, 0, sizeof(*u));
6375 const char* p = url;
6376 const char* scheme_end = strstr(p, "://");
6377 if (scheme_end) {
6378 u->scheme = strndup(p, (size_t)(scheme_end - p));
6379 p = scheme_end + 3;
6380 } else {
6381 u->scheme = strdup("http");
6382 }
6383 const char* host_end = p;
6384 while (*host_end && *host_end != '/' && *host_end != '?' && *host_end != ':') host_end++;
6385 u->host = strndup(p, (size_t)(host_end - p));
6386 p = host_end;
6387 if (*p == ':') {
6388 p++;
6389 u->port = atoi(p);
6390 while (*p && *p != '/' && *p != '?') p++;
6391 }
6392 if (*p == '/') {
6393 const char* pe = p;
6394 while (*pe && *pe != '?') pe++;
6395 u->path = strndup(p, (size_t)(pe - p));
6396 p = pe;
6397 } else {
6398 u->path = strdup("/");
6399 }
6400 if (*p == '?') {
6401 p++;
6402 u->query = strdup(p);
6403 _n_parse_query_params(u, p);
6404 }
6405 return u;
6406}
6407
6408N_STR* n_url_build(const N_URL* u) {
6409 if (!u) return NULL;
6410 N_STR* result = new_nstr(512);
6411 if (!result) return NULL;
6412 nstrprintf(result, "%s://%s", u->scheme ? u->scheme : "http", u->host ? u->host : "localhost");
6413 if (u->port > 0) {
6414 int dp = (u->scheme && strcmp(u->scheme, "https") == 0) ? 443 : 80;
6415 if (u->port != dp) nstrprintf_cat(result, ":%d", u->port);
6416 }
6417 nstrprintf_cat(result, "%s", u->path ? u->path : "/");
6418 if (u->query && u->query[0]) nstrprintf_cat(result, "?%s", u->query);
6419 return result;
6420}
6421
6422N_STR* n_url_encode(const char* str) {
6423 return n_str_url_encode(str);
6424}
6425
6426N_STR* n_url_decode(const char* str) {
6427 if (!str) return NULL;
6428 size_t len = strlen(str);
6429 N_STR* result = new_nstr(len + 1);
6430 if (!result) return NULL;
6431 for (size_t i = 0; i < len; i++) {
6432 if (str[i] == '%' && i + 2 < len && isxdigit((unsigned char)str[i + 1]) && isxdigit((unsigned char)str[i + 2])) {
6433 const char hex[3] = {str[i + 1], str[i + 2], '\0'};
6434 unsigned int val = 0;
6435 sscanf(hex, "%x", &val);
6436 nstrprintf_cat(result, "%c", (char)val);
6437 i += 2;
6438 } else if (str[i] == '+') {
6439 nstrprintf_cat(result, " ");
6440 } else {
6441 nstrprintf_cat(result, "%c", str[i]);
6442 }
6443 }
6444 return result;
6445}
6446
6447void n_url_free(N_URL** u) {
6448 if (!u || !*u) return;
6449 N_URL* p = *u;
6450 FreeNoLog(p->scheme);
6451 FreeNoLog(p->host);
6452 FreeNoLog(p->path);
6453 FreeNoLog(p->query);
6454 for (int i = 0; i < p->nb_params; i++) {
6455 FreeNoLog(p->params[i].key);
6456 FreeNoLog(p->params[i].value);
6457 }
6458 FreeNoLog(p);
6459 *u = NULL;
6460}
6461
6468static SOCKET _proxy_tcp_connect(const char* host, int port) {
6469 char port_str[16];
6470 snprintf(port_str, sizeof(port_str), "%d", port);
6471
6472 struct addrinfo hints;
6473 memset(&hints, 0, sizeof(hints));
6474 hints.ai_family = AF_UNSPEC;
6475 hints.ai_socktype = SOCK_STREAM;
6476
6477 struct addrinfo* res = NULL;
6478 int gai_rc = getaddrinfo(host, port_str, &hints, &res);
6479 if (gai_rc != 0 || !res) {
6480 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy: DNS lookup failed for %s:%d: %s",
6481 host, port, gai_strerror(gai_rc));
6482 return INVALID_SOCKET;
6483 }
6484
6485 SOCKET fd = INVALID_SOCKET;
6486 struct addrinfo* rp = NULL;
6487 for (rp = res; rp; rp = rp->ai_next) {
6488 fd = socket(rp->ai_family, rp->ai_socktype, rp->ai_protocol);
6489 if (fd == INVALID_SOCKET) continue;
6490 if (connect(fd, rp->ai_addr, (socklen_t)rp->ai_addrlen) == 0) break;
6491 closesocket(fd);
6492 fd = INVALID_SOCKET;
6493 }
6494 freeaddrinfo(res);
6495
6496 if (fd == INVALID_SOCKET) {
6497 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy: TCP connect to %s:%d failed", host, port);
6498 }
6499 return fd;
6500}
6501
6502N_PROXY_CFG* n_proxy_cfg_parse(const char* url) {
6503 if (!url) return NULL;
6504
6505 /* Expect scheme://... */
6506 const char* sep = strstr(url, "://");
6507 if (!sep) {
6508 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_cfg_parse: no scheme in '%s'", url);
6509 return NULL;
6510 }
6511
6512 size_t scheme_len = (size_t)(sep - url);
6513 if (scheme_len == 0 || scheme_len > 16) return NULL;
6514
6515 char scheme[17];
6516 memcpy(scheme, url, scheme_len);
6517 scheme[scheme_len] = '\0';
6518
6519 /* Only http, https, and socks5 */
6520 if (strcmp(scheme, "http") != 0 && strcmp(scheme, "https") != 0 && strcmp(scheme, "socks5") != 0) {
6521 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_cfg_parse: unsupported scheme '%s'", scheme);
6522 return NULL;
6523 }
6524
6525 const char* after = sep + 3; /* after :// */
6526 if (!*after) return NULL;
6527
6528 /* Check for user:pass@host:port */
6529 const char* at = strchr(after, '@');
6530 const char* host_start = NULL;
6531 char* username = NULL;
6532 char* password = NULL;
6533
6534 if (at) {
6535 /* Parse user:pass */
6536 const char* colon = strchr(after, ':');
6537 if (colon && colon < at) {
6538 username = strndup(after, (size_t)(colon - after));
6539 password = strndup(colon + 1, (size_t)(at - colon - 1));
6540 } else {
6541 username = strndup(after, (size_t)(at - after));
6542 }
6543 host_start = at + 1;
6544 } else {
6545 host_start = after;
6546 }
6547
6548 /* Parse host:port */
6549 /* Handle IPv6 [host]:port */
6550 char* hostname = NULL;
6551 int port = 0;
6552
6553 if (host_start[0] == '[') {
6554 const char* bracket = strchr(host_start, ']');
6555 if (!bracket) goto fail;
6556 hostname = strndup(host_start + 1, (size_t)(bracket - host_start - 1));
6557 if (bracket[1] == ':') {
6558 port = atoi(bracket + 2);
6559 }
6560 } else {
6561 const char* colon = strchr(host_start, ':');
6562 if (colon) {
6563 hostname = strndup(host_start, (size_t)(colon - host_start));
6564 port = atoi(colon + 1);
6565 } else {
6566 hostname = strdup(host_start);
6567 }
6568 }
6569
6570 if (!hostname || !hostname[0]) goto fail;
6571 if (port <= 0 || port > 65535) {
6572 /* Default ports */
6573 if (strcmp(scheme, "http") == 0 || strcmp(scheme, "https") == 0)
6574 port = 3128;
6575 else if (strcmp(scheme, "socks5") == 0)
6576 port = 1080;
6577 }
6578
6579 N_PROXY_CFG* cfg = NULL;
6580 Malloc(cfg, N_PROXY_CFG, 1);
6581 if (!cfg) goto fail;
6582 memset(cfg, 0, sizeof(*cfg));
6583 cfg->scheme = strdup(scheme);
6584 cfg->host = hostname;
6585 cfg->port = port;
6586 cfg->username = username;
6587 cfg->password = password;
6588 return cfg;
6589
6590fail:
6591 FreeNoLog(hostname);
6592 FreeNoLog(username);
6593 FreeNoLog(password);
6594 return NULL;
6595}
6596
6597void n_proxy_cfg_free(N_PROXY_CFG** cfg) {
6598 if (!cfg || !*cfg) return;
6599 N_PROXY_CFG* p = *cfg;
6600 FreeNoLog(p->scheme);
6601 FreeNoLog(p->host);
6602 FreeNoLog(p->username);
6603 FreeNoLog(p->password);
6604 FreeNoLog(p);
6605 *cfg = NULL;
6606}
6607
6608int n_proxy_connect_tunnel(const N_PROXY_CFG* proxy,
6609 const char* target_host,
6610 int target_port) {
6611 if (!proxy || !target_host) return -1;
6612
6613 SOCKET fd = _proxy_tcp_connect(proxy->host, proxy->port);
6614 if (fd == INVALID_SOCKET) return -1;
6615
6616 /* Build CONNECT request */
6617 char connect_req[2048];
6618 int len = 0;
6619
6620 len = snprintf(connect_req, sizeof(connect_req),
6621 "CONNECT %s:%d HTTP/1.1\r\n"
6622 "Host: %s:%d\r\n",
6623 target_host, target_port,
6624 target_host, target_port);
6625
6626 /* Proxy-Authorization if credentials present */
6627 if (proxy->username && proxy->username[0]) {
6628 char cred[512];
6629 snprintf(cred, sizeof(cred), "%s:%s",
6630 proxy->username, proxy->password ? proxy->password : "");
6631 N_STR* cred_nstr = char_to_nstr(cred);
6632 if (cred_nstr) {
6633 N_STR* b64 = n_base64_encode(cred_nstr);
6634 if (b64 && b64->data) {
6635 len += snprintf(connect_req + len,
6636 sizeof(connect_req) - (size_t)len,
6637 "Proxy-Authorization: Basic %s\r\n",
6638 b64->data);
6639 }
6640 if (b64) free_nstr(&b64);
6641 free_nstr(&cred_nstr);
6642 }
6643 }
6644
6645 len += snprintf(connect_req + len, sizeof(connect_req) - (size_t)len,
6646 "\r\n");
6647
6648 /* Send CONNECT */
6649 ssize_t sent = send(fd, connect_req, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(len), 0);
6650 if (sent != (ssize_t)len) {
6651 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel: send CONNECT failed");
6652 closesocket(fd);
6653 return -1;
6654 }
6655
6656 /* Read response */
6657 char resp_buf[4096];
6658 ssize_t nr = recv(fd, resp_buf, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(sizeof(resp_buf) - 1), 0);
6659 if (nr <= 0) {
6660 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel: no response from proxy");
6661 closesocket(fd);
6662 return -1;
6663 }
6664 resp_buf[nr] = '\0';
6665
6666 /* Check for "HTTP/1.x 200" */
6667 if (strstr(resp_buf, " 200 ") == NULL) {
6668 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel: proxy rejected CONNECT: %.*s",
6669 (int)(strchr(resp_buf, '\r') ? strchr(resp_buf, '\r') - resp_buf : nr),
6670 resp_buf);
6671 closesocket(fd);
6672 return -1;
6673 }
6674
6675 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel: tunnel established to %s:%d via %s:%d",
6676 target_host, target_port, proxy->host, proxy->port);
6677 return (int)fd;
6678}
6679
6680#ifdef HAVE_OPENSSL
6681int n_proxy_connect_tunnel_ssl(const N_PROXY_CFG* proxy,
6682 const char* target_host,
6683 int target_port) {
6684 if (!proxy || !target_host) return -1;
6685
6686 SOCKET fd = _proxy_tcp_connect(proxy->host, proxy->port);
6687 if (fd == INVALID_SOCKET) return -1;
6688
6689 /* TLS handshake to the proxy itself */
6690 netw_init_openssl();
6691
6692#if OPENSSL_VERSION_NUMBER >= 0x10100000L
6693 const SSL_METHOD* method = TLS_client_method();
6694#else
6695 const SSL_METHOD* method = TLSv1_2_client_method();
6696#endif
6697 SSL_CTX* ctx = SSL_CTX_new(method);
6698 if (!ctx) {
6699 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel_ssl: SSL_CTX_new failed");
6700 closesocket(fd);
6701 return -1;
6702 }
6703 SSL_CTX_set_default_verify_paths(ctx);
6704
6705 SSL* ssl = SSL_new(ctx);
6706 if (!ssl) {
6707 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel_ssl: SSL_new failed");
6708 SSL_CTX_free(ctx);
6709 closesocket(fd);
6710 return -1;
6711 }
6712 SSL_set_fd(ssl, (int)fd);
6713 SSL_set_tlsext_host_name(ssl, proxy->host);
6714
6715 if (SSL_connect(ssl) <= 0) {
6716 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel_ssl: TLS handshake to proxy %s:%d failed",
6717 proxy->host, proxy->port);
6718 SSL_free(ssl);
6719 SSL_CTX_free(ctx);
6720 closesocket(fd);
6721 return -1;
6722 }
6723
6724 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel_ssl: TLS established to proxy %s:%d",
6725 proxy->host, proxy->port);
6726
6727 /* Build CONNECT request */
6728 char connect_req[2048];
6729 int len = 0;
6730
6731 len = snprintf(connect_req, sizeof(connect_req),
6732 "CONNECT %s:%d HTTP/1.1\r\n"
6733 "Host: %s:%d\r\n",
6734 target_host, target_port,
6735 target_host, target_port);
6736
6737 /* Proxy-Authorization if credentials present */
6738 if (proxy->username && proxy->username[0]) {
6739 char cred[512];
6740 snprintf(cred, sizeof(cred), "%s:%s",
6741 proxy->username, proxy->password ? proxy->password : "");
6742 N_STR* cred_nstr = char_to_nstr(cred);
6743 if (cred_nstr) {
6744 N_STR* b64 = n_base64_encode(cred_nstr);
6745 if (b64 && b64->data) {
6746 len += snprintf(connect_req + len,
6747 sizeof(connect_req) - (size_t)len,
6748 "Proxy-Authorization: Basic %s\r\n",
6749 b64->data);
6750 }
6751 if (b64) free_nstr(&b64);
6752 free_nstr(&cred_nstr);
6753 }
6754 }
6755
6756 len += snprintf(connect_req + len, sizeof(connect_req) - (size_t)len,
6757 "\r\n");
6758
6759 /* Send CONNECT over TLS */
6760 if (SSL_write(ssl, connect_req, len) != len) {
6761 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel_ssl: send CONNECT failed");
6762 SSL_free(ssl);
6763 SSL_CTX_free(ctx);
6764 closesocket(fd);
6765 return -1;
6766 }
6767
6768 /* Read response over TLS */
6769 char resp_buf[4096];
6770 int nr = SSL_read(ssl, resp_buf, (int)(sizeof(resp_buf) - 1));
6771 if (nr <= 0) {
6772 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel_ssl: no response from proxy");
6773 SSL_free(ssl);
6774 SSL_CTX_free(ctx);
6775 closesocket(fd);
6776 return -1;
6777 }
6778 resp_buf[nr] = '\0';
6779
6780 /* Check for "HTTP/1.x 200" */
6781 if (strstr(resp_buf, " 200 ") == NULL) {
6782 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel_ssl: proxy rejected CONNECT: %.*s",
6783 (int)(strchr(resp_buf, '\r') ? strchr(resp_buf, '\r') - resp_buf : nr),
6784 resp_buf);
6785 SSL_free(ssl);
6786 SSL_CTX_free(ctx);
6787 closesocket(fd);
6788 return -1;
6789 }
6790
6791 /* Tunnel established, tear down the proxy TLS session but keep the fd.
6792 * SSL_shutdown sends close_notify; the proxy knows the CONNECT handshake
6793 * is done and the raw tunnel begins. We call SSL_set_quiet_shutdown to
6794 * avoid waiting for the peer's close_notify (the proxy won't send one
6795 * mid-tunnel). */
6796 SSL_set_quiet_shutdown(ssl, 1);
6797 SSL_shutdown(ssl);
6798 SSL_free(ssl);
6799 SSL_CTX_free(ctx);
6800
6801 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "n_proxy_connect_tunnel_ssl: tunnel established to %s:%d via https://%s:%d",
6802 target_host, target_port, proxy->host, proxy->port);
6803 return (int)fd;
6804}
6805#endif /* HAVE_OPENSSL */
6806
6807int n_proxy_connect_socks5(const N_PROXY_CFG* proxy,
6808 const char* target_host,
6809 int target_port) {
6810 if (!proxy || !target_host) return -1;
6811
6812 SOCKET fd = _proxy_tcp_connect(proxy->host, proxy->port);
6813 if (fd == INVALID_SOCKET) return -1;
6814
6815 int use_auth = (proxy->username && proxy->username[0]) ? 1 : 0;
6816
6817 /* SOCKS5 greeting */
6818 char greeting[4];
6819 if (use_auth) {
6820 greeting[0] = 0x05; /* version */
6821 greeting[1] = 0x02; /* 2 methods */
6822 greeting[2] = 0x00; /* no auth */
6823 greeting[3] = 0x02; /* user/pass */
6824 if (send(fd, greeting, 4, 0) != 4) goto fail;
6825 } else {
6826 greeting[0] = 0x05;
6827 greeting[1] = 0x01;
6828 greeting[2] = 0x00;
6829 if (send(fd, greeting, 3, 0) != 3) goto fail;
6830 }
6831
6832 /* Read server method selection */
6833 char method_resp[2];
6834 if (recv(fd, method_resp, 2, 0) != 2) goto fail;
6835 if (method_resp[0] != 0x05) goto fail;
6836
6837 if (method_resp[1] == 0x02 && use_auth) {
6838 /* User/pass auth sub-negotiation (RFC 1929) */
6839 size_t ulen = strlen(proxy->username);
6840 size_t plen = proxy->password ? strlen(proxy->password) : 0;
6841 if (ulen > 255 || plen > 255) goto fail;
6842
6843 char auth_req[515]; /* 1+1+255+1+255 */
6844 size_t pos = 0;
6845 auth_req[pos++] = 0x01; /* version */
6846 auth_req[pos++] = (char)ulen;
6847 memcpy(auth_req + pos, proxy->username, ulen);
6848 pos += ulen;
6849 auth_req[pos++] = (char)plen;
6850 if (plen > 0) {
6851 memcpy(auth_req + pos, proxy->password, plen);
6852 pos += plen;
6853 }
6854 if (send(fd, auth_req, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(pos), 0) != (ssize_t)pos) goto fail;
6855
6856 char auth_resp[2];
6857 if (recv(fd, auth_resp, 2, 0) != 2) goto fail;
6858 if (auth_resp[1] != 0x00) {
6859 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_socks5: auth rejected");
6860 goto fail;
6861 }
6862 } else if (method_resp[1] != 0x00) {
6863 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_socks5: no acceptable method");
6864 goto fail;
6865 }
6866
6867 /* Send connect request (domain name addressing) */
6868 {
6869 size_t hlen = strlen(target_host);
6870 if (hlen > 255) goto fail;
6871
6872 char conn_req[263]; /* 4 + 1 + 255 + 2 */
6873 size_t pos = 0;
6874 conn_req[pos++] = 0x05; /* version */
6875 conn_req[pos++] = 0x01; /* connect */
6876 conn_req[pos++] = 0x00; /* reserved */
6877 conn_req[pos++] = 0x03; /* domain name */
6878 conn_req[pos++] = (char)hlen;
6879 memcpy(conn_req + pos, target_host, hlen);
6880 pos += hlen;
6881 conn_req[pos++] = (char)((target_port >> 8) & 0xFF);
6882 conn_req[pos++] = (char)(target_port & 0xFF);
6883
6884 if (send(fd, conn_req, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(pos), 0) != (ssize_t)pos) goto fail;
6885 }
6886
6887 /* Read connect response */
6888 {
6889 char conn_resp[10];
6890 /* Minimum response: 4 bytes header + address (varies) */
6891 ssize_t nr = recv(fd, conn_resp, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(sizeof(conn_resp)), 0);
6892 if (nr < 4) goto fail;
6893 if (conn_resp[0] != 0x05 || conn_resp[1] != 0x00) {
6894 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_socks5: connect failed, reply=%02x",
6895 conn_resp[1]);
6896 goto fail;
6897 }
6898
6899 /* If address type is domain (0x03), we may need to read more */
6900 if (conn_resp[3] == 0x03 && nr < 5) {
6901 /* Read remaining bytes */
6902 char extra[256];
6903 recv(fd, extra, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(sizeof(extra)), 0);
6904 } else if (conn_resp[3] == 0x04 && nr < 10) {
6905 /* IPv6: 16 + 2 bytes remaining */
6906 char extra[18];
6907 size_t need = 22 - (size_t)nr; /* total IPv6 response = 4+16+2=22 */
6908 if (need <= sizeof(extra)) {
6909 recv(fd, extra, NETW_BUFLEN_CAST(need), 0);
6910 }
6911 }
6912 }
6913
6914 n_log(LOG_DEBUG, "n_proxy_connect_socks5: tunnel established to %s:%d via %s:%d",
6915 target_host, target_port, proxy->host, proxy->port);
6916 return (int)fd;
6917
6918fail:
6919 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_proxy_connect_socks5: handshake failed");
6920 closesocket(fd);
6921 return -1;
6922}
